---
title: "V(D)J analysis"
params: 
  patient: "P2"
  file: "~/Documents/Singlecell-R/Scripts/Matrix/CLL_Seurat_P2.rds"
  folder_trust4: "~/Documents/Singlecell-R/Scripts/Matrix/VDJ_TRUST4/"
  output: "~/Documents/Singlecell-R/Scripts/Plots/"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## V(D)J analysis: track clonotypes 

Analysis done with TRUST4 on the BAM, timepoint separately

Explore the results after the TRUST4 run in the script bash VDJ_TRSUT4.sh

Libraries and data

```{r}
#| message: false
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
source("functions.R")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
d1<-read.table(paste0(params$folder_trust4,"vdj_p2_D1_barcode_report.tsv"), header = FALSE, sep="\t")
colnames(d1)<-c("Barcodes","Celltype","Chain 1", "Chain 2", "Secondary chain 1", "Secondary chain 2")
d1$Barcodes <- paste0("D1_", d1$Barcodes)
```

```{r}
data<-readRDS(params$file)
barcodes <- colnames(data)
```

```{r}
# keep only the cells present in the Seurat object
d1 <- d1[d1$Barcodes %in% barcodes, ]
```
